title: PinkSweet GUI
description: A complete GUI transformation in serene pink. Full extension of the my [SweetSweet HUD!]
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81460e5b2024f7c1fe61c11e53f9deed4415052b.png) *** ### **Related projects:** ✦-๑┆ ![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5150a5e8ff70946bddcf735276f9fa1ef3cc73d.png) [SweetSweet HUD](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sweet-sweet-hud) ┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦┆ ![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bfc2191a03e40fe2b271a3da44c69b3277070cc2.png) [LilacSweet GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lilacsweet-gui) ┆๑-✦ *** ### **Features:** Every menu, inventory screen, and crafting interface has been redesigned with custom pink-toned textures. Some interactive blocks have a special background, but the rest of the style only improves the vanilla windows of interactions and all that stuff
This pack is designed as a direct upgrade of my HUD pack. All the familiar elements from the HUD version (like health, armor, hunger, XP & hotbar) are included and perfectly matched to the new GUI style
｡ ₊°༺💗༻°₊ ｡ *** ### **Support & Contact:** Love this pack? Support me on [Boosty](https://boosty.to/reterica)!
For any questions or suggestions, reach me out via my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/QsezmMbPQF)
